green_jobs.description: Welcome to the exciting world of aerospace manufacturing at Boeing! As a Composites Manufacturing Engineer, you will play a critical role in the production of cutting-edge composite materials for our industry-leading aircraft. Your expertise and attention to detail will be key in ensuring the highest quality and efficiency in our manufacturing processes. To excel in this role, you should have a strong background in composites manufacturing and a passion for innovation and problem-solving. If you

yellow_jobs.description:
Position Overview:

The Manufacturing Engineer will be responsible for designing, implementing and optimizing manufacturing processes to ensure efficient production and high-quality products.

Key Responsibilities:
• Evaluate and improve manufacturing processes to enhance efficiency and quality.
• Design and implement new manufacturing systems and processes.
• Conduct root cause analysis and implement corrective actions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify areas for improvement.

Summary

We are seeking a highly skilled manufacturing engineer to support in-house production of complex composite parts and assemblies. This role will interface heavily with both the product engineering group and the production floor, bringing new designs to fruition, improving manufacturing efficiency on current products, and supporting the day-to-day operations of a fast-paced manufacturing environment.

Essential Duties & Responsibilities

BRIDGE INSPECTION ENGINEER II
This position assists with various inspections of in-service bridges and culverts for cities, counties, villages, and MDOT.

Inspections include but are not limited to routine safety inspections, in-depth inspections, detailed inspections, fracture critical inspections, fatigue sensitive inspections, scour inspections, etc.
